creative_brief: Split screen showing a product label with farm details next to the actual farm/farmer photo, emphasizing the direct connection.
primary_text:
Do you know the name of the farm that raised your last steak?

Rachel's cattle graze on regenerative pastures in Kempsey NSW. No hormones, no feedlots.

Collins catches our salmon wild off the South Coast. Every product shows the farmer's name and story. No middlemen marking up prices through long supply chains.

Collect fresh from Brookvale, Monday to Friday. No commitment.

See the general CSF risk warning + offer document.
headline: See your farm before you buy
description: Every product shows the farmer's name and story. Collect from Brookvale hub.
